# ALAuthorizationStatus.authorized

**Case**

User has authorized this application to access photos data.

## Declaration

```swift
case authorized
```

## Constants

- **ALAuthorizationStatus.notDetermined**: User has not yet made a choice with regards to this application.
- **ALAuthorizationStatus.restricted**: This application is not authorized to access photo data.
- **ALAuthorizationStatus.denied**: User has explicitly denied this application access to photos data.
